vocab.example: While I was a bundle of energy as a kid, my current work-life balance has unfortunately led to a more sedentary lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi trí tuệ
vocab.example: My preferences have shifted from purely physical play to intellectual pursuits like reading philosophy or learning a new language.
There has been a marked shift in my recreational preferences; I now value tranquility over the high-octane games of my youth.

vocab.meaning: tỏa ra sự sung sức/năng lượng
vocab.example: Childhood activities were all about exuding vigor, whereas now I prioritize hobbies that help me decompress.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thể chất căng thẳng/nặng nhọc
vocab.example: I’ve become less inclined toward strenuous activities like competitive football, opting instead for low-impact exercises.

vocab.meaning: sự thưởng thức có chiều sâu/tinh tế
vocab.example: I've developed a nuanced appreciation for nature walks, something I would have found incredibly dull when I was seven.

vocab.meaning: sự tham gia về mặt nhận thức/trí não
vocab.example: Modern board games offer a level of cognitive engagement that far surpasses the simple toys I played with as a youngster.

vocab.meaning: sự rèn luyện/trau dồi cá nhân trong tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: Nowadays, I find solace in solitary refinement like painting, a stark contrast to the rowdy group activities of my childhood.
Collecting trading cards was an ephemeral interest of mine, but my passion for music has stood the test of time.

vocab.meaning: khác biệt/phân tách một cách đáng kể
vocab.example: My current weekend routine diverges significantly from my childhood, where I’d spend every waking hour outdoors.
